sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39032" key="e)pigenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιγεν-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n39032.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">growing after</tr_> (opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συγγενής</foreign>), <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φακός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:194" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.194</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
